title: Kanom Jeen Nam Ngiaw
description: A traditional Thai curried noodle soup made with a variety of flavors and textures.
instructions: Heat the coconut milk in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the funky red curry paste and stir until fragrant.
Add the crunchy peanuts and southern style sweet potatoes, cook for 5 minutes.
Add the kanom jeen noodles and stir to combine.
Add the jeen (Thai herbs) and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Optional: Add protein such as chicken or tofu for added flavor.
Optional: Add other vegetables such as bell peppers or carrots for added flavor.
Optional: Serve with a side of fresh herbs or a sprinkle of peanuts for garnish.
